ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact for the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact for the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger associated with the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* The ticket number issued to the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Price of the ticket fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the ticket (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "cancellation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ticket has been cancelled (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage or cruise */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure for the voyage */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival for the voyage */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the voyage */,
  "current_load" INTEGER /* Current number of passengers on board */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port of departure for the voyage */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port of arrival for the voyage */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route taken during the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyages" (
  "passenger_voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-voyage association */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger associated with the voyage */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage associated with the passenger */,
  "boarding_status" TEXT /* Status of the passenger's boarding process (e.g., 'checked-in', 'onboard', 'cancelled') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyages_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyages_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "ticket_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket class (e.g., 'Economy', 'Premium Economy', 'Business') */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket class */,
  "fare_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier used to calculate the fare for the ticket class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_class_voyages" (
  "ticket_class_voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket class-voyage association */,
  "ticket_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket class associated with the voyage */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage associated with the ticket class */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats for the ticket class on the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_class_voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_class_voyages_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_class_voyages_ticket_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_class_id") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("ticket_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., 'Admin', 'Operational Staff', 'Emergency Responder') */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
